name: Syrup Village
description: Syrup Village is a peaceful, idyllic coastal village known for its wealthy families and tranquil lifestyle. The village gained notoriety when the infamous Captain Kuro attempted to seize the fortune of the sick heiress Kaya through an elaborate three-year deception. It's the hometown of Usopp and where the Straw Hats acquired their first proper ship, the Going Merry.
history: Syrup Village has been a quiet, prosperous settlement for generations. The Kaya family were among the wealthiest residents, known for their kindness. Three years before Luffy's arrival, a mysterious butler named Klahadore appeared and slowly gained Kaya's trust after her parents' death. In reality, he was the ruthless Captain Kuro planning to inherit her fortune. Usopp, the village's resident liar and storyteller, discovered the plot. With the Straw Hats' help, they exposed Kuro and saved both Kaya and the village.
culture: Syrup Village culture is characterized by peaceful daily routines, wealthy estates, and a tolerance for harmless tall tales. Usopp's daily 'pirate raids' warnings became a beloved tradition despite being lies. The village values honesty and hard work, though they forgave Usopp's harmless stories. After the real pirate attack, villagers gained newfound respect for Usopp's bravery.
transportation: Small boats for fishing and trading. The Going Merry was built in the village's shipyard. Travel within the village is primarily on foot along tree-lined paths.

notablePeople.name: Usopp
notablePeople.description: The village storyteller and self-proclaimed captain of imaginary pirates. Son of Yasopp, he proved his bravery defending Kaya and joined Luffy's crew.

notablePeople.name: Kaya
notablePeople.description: The kind, wealthy heiress who was ill with grief after her parents' death. She gave the Straw Hats the Going Merry as thanks for saving her life.

notablePeople.name: Captain Kuro
notablePeople.description: The ruthless ex-pirate captain disguised as butler Klahadore. Master of the 'Silent Step' technique and wielder of cat claws.

notablePeople.name: Merry
notablePeople.description: Kaya's loyal butler who designed the Going Merry. He was manipulated by Kuro but ultimately sided with Kaya.

notablePeople.name: Jango
notablePeople.description: Kuro's hypnotist first mate with a heart-shaped pendulum. He later reforms and joins the Marines.

notablePeople.name: Ninjin
notablePeople.description: One of three young boys who follow Usopp and help defend the village.

notablePeople.name: Piiman
notablePeople.description: One of Usopp's young followers who showed courage during the Black Cat Pirates attack.

notablePeople.name: Tamanegi
notablePeople.description: The third member of the Usopp Pirates, a loyal friend who defended the village.

subLocations.name: Kaya's Mansion
subLocations.description: The grand mansion where Kaya lives with her servants. Site of Kuro's elaborate three-year deception.
notableFeatures: Where the Going Merry was gifted

subLocations.name: Northern Slope
subLocations.description: The isolated coastal area where Kuro planned to have his crew land and carry out his plan.

subLocations.name: Village Center
subLocations.description: The peaceful village where Usopp grew up and told his stories every morning.

subLocations.name: Shipyard
subLocations.description: The shipyard where Merry designed and built the Going Merry.
notableFeatures: Where the Going Merry was born

items.name: Going Merry
items.description: The caravel ship designed by Merry and gifted by Kaya. It became the Straw Hats' first true home.

items.name: Cat Claws
items.description: Kuro's signature weapons - long, blade-like claws attached to gloves.

items.name: Jango's Pendulum
items.description: The heart-shaped chakram used by Jango to hypnotize victims.

items.name: Usopp's Slingshot
items.description: Usopp's trusty slingshot that he used to defend the village.

factions.name: Syrup Village Citizens
factions.description: Peaceful villagers who tolerated Usopp's lies and were saved from Kuro's plot.

factions.name: Black Cat Pirates
factions.description: Kuro's former crew brought back for one final job. Defeated by the Straw Hats.

factions.name: Usopp Pirates
factions.description: Three brave kids who followed Usopp and helped defend their village.

factions.name: Kaya's Household
factions.description: The staff serving Kaya's estate, unknowingly harboring an enemy.

events: Straw Hats arrive seeking a ship
Klahadore reveals himself as Captain Kuro
Jango hypnotizes Kaya to write a will
Battle at the Northern Slope begins
Zoro vs Jango and the Nyaban Brothers
Kaya gifts the Going Merry to the Straw Hats

videos.title: Going Merry Joins the Crew
